name: Aspen Racquet Club
description: Come play pickleball at Aspen Racquet Club in Wooster, OH! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Christmas Run Park
description: Courts are located at two locations in park.

name: Christmas Run Park, upper courts
description: Public courts across from the old YMCA. Resurfaced 2023. Lighted courts. Located on the west side of the park.

name: Memorial Park
description:
2 Dedicated Courts
Open in Fall of 2023
The main entrance is on Gates Street, where off street, angle parking is available as well as a parking lot with handicapped accessibility. Kohler Street and Hilltop Dr. provides another entrance and Portage Street provides three entrances.

The worn-out tennis courts were replaced by two new pickleball courts and an additional half-court basketball court. All court surfaces have been painted and look wonderful! These courts have gotten a lot of use since they have been completed. If you drive by you’ll likely see a lot of activity taking place!

There is no scheduled play.  First come, first serve.
 Posted by Rick Warsinskey, NE Ohio PB Ambassador; contact Rick to get his comprehensive online guides where to play PB in NE Ohio at rickwarsinskey@gmail.com or 1-216-409-2882.

name: Mt Eaton Pickleball Courts
description: Mt Eaton Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Mount Eaton, OH. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Rittman Recreation Center
description: Rittman Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Rittman, OH. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
